option.value:
from pydantic import BaseModel
class AskRequest(BaseModel): question: str user_id: str session_id: str

option.name: originalContent

from app.observability.trace_logger import Logger
__all__ = ["Logger"]

option.value:
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional, TypedDict
class RoutedQuery(TypedDict, total=False): route: str query: str context: Optional[Any] message: str debug: Dict[str, Any]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import ollama
def generate_response(messages: list): response = ollama.chat( model="llama3:latest", messages=messages, ) return response["message"]["content"]

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
option.value:
from app.services.llm.ollama_client import generate_response
__all__ = ["generate_response"]

option.value:
from app.services.tools.stock_price_tool import get_stock_price from app.services.tools.ticker_extractor import extract_ticker
__all__ = ["extract_ticker", "get_stock_price"]
